results.title: Reducer Fittings | Variety of shapes | Online Metals
results.snippet: Reducer fittings are used to connect pipes of different sizes and facilitating a smooth transition between them. They feature a conical shape with one end larger than the other, allowing for the reduction or enlargement of pipe diameter.
